name: breakout-game
description: 3D Breakout game with Three.js, WebAssembly physics, and Node.js backend

scripts.build:wasm: cd cpp && emcc physics.cpp -o ../wasm/physics.js -s WASM=1 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS='[_malloc, _free, _initPhysics, _updateBallPaddleCollision, _updateBallBrickCollision, _getBallVelocityX, _getBallVelocityY, _getBallVelocityZ, _setBallPosition, _getBallPositionX, _getBallPositionY, _getBallPositionZ, _applyPaddleForce, _applyBrickDestruction]' -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='[ccall, cwrap]' -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=PhysicsModule
scripts.dev: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:frontend && npm run start:server
